title: Conditional colouring support in Dashboards

posts.author: Caspar (Caspar van Abbe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody,

I’m using conditional colouring to highlight certain information in my project-boards.
For example if time spent is within budget it is green and if it is over budget it turns to red, pretty standard and it works fine in the board itself.

Now I also create dashboards based on the above mentioned project boards that show the time spent versus budget, only I notice the the conditional colouring is not showing in the dashboard and there is also no option to add it there as far as I can see (but maybe I’m missing something?).

Is there a workaround?
Is this something that will be added in the future?

Thanks

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
